name: Hrolf Bear-Tongue

aspects.high_concept: The Braggart of Bruma, Loud-Mouthed Bounty Hunter Chasing a Big Story
aspects.trouble: Can't Resist an Audience, Overcommits to the Bit
other_aspects: Wants to Go Home With a Saga

stunts: Bruma Boast: +2 to Provoke when challenging a named opponent in public.
Cheap Shot: +2 to Fight on the first exchange if Hrolf acts first.
Bail Like a Rabbit: Once per scene, +2 to Athletics when Overcoming to disengage/escape after taking stress.
notes: Hrolf is an early-ladder hunter: dangerous enough to matter, social enough to talk. He's here for coin and a story, not cruelty.
combat_tactics: Starts with loud Provoke to force a duel or concession, then commits hard. If he meets real resistance, he tries to retreat with face-saving threats.
social_interaction: Talkative, braggy, surprisingly responsive to respect. If Wayn offers him a better story than 'dragged in chains,' Hrolf can be redirected.
story_hooks: Knows gossip about Bravil's corruption and how the bounty started spreading by word-of-mouth.
Can become a recurring comedic rival if spared.
May switch sides if Wayn offers coin plus honor (and lets him keep his pride).
gm_notes: Play him like a man auditioning for legend. He should be beatable, but not trivial. Reward clever social play.
